name: Cape Town
tagline: Stunning Natural Beauty, World-Class Wine, and Remarkable Affordability
description: Cape Town is consistently ranked among the most beautiful cities in the world, and for FIRE retirees the value proposition is extraordinary. Table Mountain, pristine beaches, a thriving food and wine scene, and modern infrastructure come at a fraction of Western prices. The rand's weakness against the dollar means your portfolio stretches remarkably far. English is widely spoken, healthcare quality is high at private facilities, and the Mediterranean climate delivers mild winters and warm, dry summers. Load-shedding (rolling blackouts) remains an occasional nuisance but is increasingly managed with solar and battery solutions.

quickFacts.visa: 90-day visa-free stay for US citizens; retirement visa available
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – exercise caution, avoid certain areas at night
quickFacts.climate: Mediterranean with warm dry summers and mild wet winters
quickFacts.englishFriendly: Moderate – English widely spoken but Afrikaans and Xhosa common

housing.description: Modern 2BR apartment in Observatory, Woodstock, or Sea Point

dining.description: Regular dining at diverse restaurants, braai spots, and cafes 4-5x/week

healthcare.description: Private medical aid (Discovery Health) with hospital and day-to-day cover

transportation.description: Used car with insurance, fuel, and MyCiTi bus for commuting

entertainment.description: Beach days, Table Mountain hikes, Kirstenbosch concerts, wine tasting in Stellenbosch

1M.lifestyle: A modern 2-bedroom apartment in Observatory, Woodstock, or Sea Point. Dining out at diverse restaurants and braai spots several times a week, with a used car for getting around. Private medical aid through Discovery Health with hospital cover. Table Mountain hikes, beach days, and wine tasting in Stellenbosch on weekends are all affordable. The rand exchange rate makes this a comfortable life, though load-shedding and personal security require some adjustment.

housing.description: Spacious 3BR apartment in Camps Bay, Green Point, or a house in Constantia

dining.description: Regular dining at top Cape Town restaurants like La Colombe, The Test Kitchen, and Kloof Street spots

healthcare.description: Comprehensive private medical aid with specialist and dental coverage

transportation.description: Reliable car with comprehensive insurance, fuel, and maintenance

entertainment.description: Wine estate memberships, surfing, premium Kirstenbosch events, Cape Point excursions, Franschhoek weekends

2M.lifestyle: A spacious apartment in Camps Bay or Green Point, or a house in Constantia with a garden. Regular dining at top restaurants on Kloof Street and in the Winelands. A reliable car, comprehensive private medical aid, and wine estate memberships. Weekend trips to Franschhoek and Cape Point are easy. Comfortable upper-middle-class Cape Town living with a solid monthly margin.

housing.description: Luxury 4BR house in Camps Bay, Clifton, or a wine estate property in Constantia

dining.description: Top-tier restaurants like La Colombe, FYN, and Salsify regularly; private wine dinners

healthcare.description: Premium private medical aid with full specialist, dental, and alternative therapy coverage

transportation.description: Late-model SUV, comprehensive insurance, fuel; occasional private driver

entertainment.description: Premium wine club memberships, private golf, sailing, safari trips to Kruger, art gallery openings

3M.lifestyle: A large house in Camps Bay or Clifton with Atlantic Ocean views, a late-model SUV, and regular dining at FYN, Salsify, and other top-tier restaurants. Premium private medical aid with full specialist coverage. A cleaner a few times a week. Safari trips to Kruger, sailing, and golf are comfortable additions. This is a genuinely affluent Cape Town life with room for regular domestic and international travel.

housing.description: Oceanfront villa in Clifton, Bantry Bay, or a luxury wine estate in the Winelands

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive dining experiences, private wine estate dinners, catered events

healthcare.description: Top-tier private medical aid with concierge service, international coverage

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle, comprehensive insurance, private driver on call

entertainment.description: Exclusive golf club memberships, yacht charter, helicopter tours, art collecting, philanthropy

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, cook, gardener, security guard, pool maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Private safari lodges, first-class international travel, luxury wine collecting, charitable giving

5M.lifestyle: An oceanfront villa in Clifton or Bantry Bay, a luxury car with a driver on call, and a housekeeper, cook, and gardener. Regular dining at the city's best restaurants, premium medical aid with international coverage, and business class flights for longer trips. Safari lodge stays and wine estate weekends are routine. The rand exchange rate means this budget delivers a very high quality of life with meaningful margin.

housing.description: Trophy estate in Clifton, Fresnaye, or a private Winelands compound with vineyards

dining.description: Personal chef team, exclusive private dining, catered events and charity galas

healthcare.description: Top-tier private concierge medicine, international medevac coverage, executive wellness

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, full-time driver, helicopter charter account

entertainment.description: Yacht ownership, private game reserves, art collecting, international philanthropy, cultural patronage

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff: housekeeper, chef, gardener, security team, personal assistant, driver

luxuryExtras.description: Private game lodge ownership, yacht, first-class global travel, vineyard operations, major philanthropy

10M.lifestyle: A premium property in Clifton or Fresnaye with sweeping ocean views, full household staff including a housekeeper, cook, gardener, driver, and security. Multiple vehicles, first class international flights, and top-tier private concierge medicine. Regular fine dining, premium club memberships, and stays at private game reserves. Cape Town's costs are moderate by global standards, so this budget provides a very comfortable life with a large margin each month.
